description: Weekly promotional offers announcing buy-one-get-one-free deals on food and beverage products with specific pricing and size options clearly stated.
structural_recipe: Post weekly promotion announcement with: (1) Clear BOGO offer statement in Arabic ('اشتر 1 واحصل على الثاني مجاناً'), (2) Product names and variants (cup vs liter sizes), (3) Specific pricing in SAR, (4) Validity dates and duration, (5) Brand hashtag, (6) Emoji accents for visual appeal. Structure as carousel or single image with overlaid text highlighting savings.
why_it_works: BOGO offers create perceived value and urgency in Saudi market, encouraging immediate purchase decisions. Clear pricing transparency builds trust. Weekly rotation maintains audience engagement and repeat visits to check latest deals. Arabic-language specificity demonstrates local market respect.
transplantation_caveats: Ensure pricing clearly displays both individual and bundled costs to comply with Saudi consumer protection expectations
Verify inventory availability matches promotion scope to avoid customer dissatisfaction
Regional preferences for product types vary; test offer appeal before wide deployment
BOGO promotions may attract deal-seekers rather than brand loyalists; monitor repeat purchase rates
cultural_constraints: Use Arabic for primary offer messaging to maximize local relevance
Consider prayer times and Ramadan seasonality for promotion timing
Maintain professional tone while using casual emoji to match Saudi social media conventions
